articles.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Strait of Hormuz dispute deepens
articles.description: By Elwely Elwelly, Tala Ramadan and Katharine JacksonDUBAI/WASHINGTON, July 13 (Reuters) - U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged missile and drone attacks on Monday and clashed over control the Strait of Hormuz, casting doubt on the viability of an interim deal to halt their war and driving oil prices higher.After Iran's announcement of the strait's closure over the weekend, U.S. President Donald Trump said on Monday the United States would probably take over the waterway and should be reimbursed for controlling the vital shipping route.

articles.title: Petrol and diesel prices rising in Switzerland again
articles.description: Fuel prices in Switzerland have recently risen by 1.7%.

articles.title: Benz responds after YouTuber Sourav Joshi blames E20 petrol for mileage drop
articles.description: Mercedes-Benz India says their BS VI petrol cars are built and approved to run on E20 fuel without specifically mentioning YouTuber Sourav Joshi.

articles.title: Oil pangs resurface for rupee, options market gauge signals bearish bias
articles.description: The Indian rupee fell to its weakest level in over a month as oil prices surged following US-Iran strikes and Iran's claim of closing the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Wall Street Stumbles Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions and Volatile Chip Stocks
articles.description: Wall Street's main indexes faced a downturn as tensions between the U.S. and Iran escalated, pushing oil prices higher. This development, along with pressure on semiconductor stocks, disrupted investor sentiment. Key economic data and corporate earnings reports are awaited amid the ongoing U.S.-Iran geopolitical crisis.

articles.title: US market today: Stock futures slip as West Asia tensions lift crude prices
articles.description: US stock futures fall as US-Iran hostilities escalate, pushing oil prices higher. Tech stocks decline ahead of key inflation data and corporate earnings reports.

articles.title: Mercedes-Benz Vehicles E20 Petrol Compatible In India? Company's Tweet Divides Internet
articles.description: Blending facts with fiction under duress? Netizens demand the truth (and nothing but the truth) on how E20 affects mileage and material of the vehicle. Meanwhile, the heart of all mudda/issues is water. Read the article to know why.

articles.title: Refreshed US-Iran strikes enter second day
articles.description: DUBAI - US military strikes on Iran entered a second day on Monday in a new surge of fighting over the status of the Strait of Hormuz that endangered a fragile interim agreement and sent oil prices spiking.

articles.title: Asda makes major change for shoppers filling up at petrol stations this month
articles.description: The supermarket will be making a change for motorists shopping in its stores up to July 31
